titleStmt.title: SII 25.204: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 204. (A.R. No. 204 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south base of the verandah of the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
The epigraph may be assigned to c. 13th century on palaeographical grounds.

It records an order of the prince (piḷḷai) to his officer Kuṟukkai-uḍaiyāṉ through the nagarattār of Mummuḍiśōḻapuram for the levy (kaḍamai) to be imposed on each load of paddy or rice carried in the route called Seṉanādaṉ (Jaṉanāthaṉ)-pādai for the tiruppaḍimāṟṟu to the deity Tiruvusāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār. The sub-division Teṉkarai-nāḍu is mentioned at the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kuṟukkai Uṭaiyāṉukkuc cellumpaṭi tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentira coḻa
tevaṟkku yāṇṭu pattāvatiṉ netirāmāṇṭu mummuṭi coḻapurattu nakarattom Ōlai . nammūril ce
ṉanātaṉa pātaittuṟaiyil nel Arici matikiṟa potiyil kaṭamaikkumiḻakiṟa Ariciyile Oru poti matippaṭi
Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tiruppaṭi māṟṟukku viṭuvateṉṟu piḷḷaiyolai Eḻutiṉamaiyi
l Ippoti Oṉṟil nammuṭaiya nilakkūliyāy peṟum Ariciyum Ippoti Oṉṟukku pāṭikāvalum kaivāciyum po
tiyāl varum kācuvaṟkam Uḷḷiṭṭa viniyokaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa tiruppaṭi Uṭalāka kuṭukkap paṇṇuvate taṉakku Eḻutiṉa Olaippaṭik
ke Uṭaiyār koyilile cantirātittavaraiyum peṟu(vu)vatāka kalveṭṭikoḷvatākavum paṇṇuvāta Ippa
ṭikku Ivai tenkaraināṭṭuThe record stops abruptly here.
Digital edition of SII 25.204 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
